data.title: Ruihe Digital Technology Holdings announces HK$80 million cryptocurrency investment plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of Ruihe Digital Technology Holdings Co., Ltd. (03680.HK), the board of directors has approved a budget of HK$80 million to develop Web3.0 business and invest in cryptocurrency assets in the next two years. The company said that this move is aimed at responding to the Hong Kong government's policy of supporting the development of Web3.0 and cryptocurrency industries. It plans to focus on digital asset services in Greater China and provide funds through internal resources or fundraising activities. The company believes that cryptocurrency asset investment is in line with the global trend of digital asset institutionalization and will help enhance overall competitiveness.

data.title: PUMP Falls 15% After Founder Confirms No Immediate Airdrop
data.description:
TL;DR PUMP crashed 15% below ICO price after its founder “@0xsyste” definitively stated “There is no airdrop,” crushing widespread community speculation. Sell-offs surged as “airdrop farmers” exited, erasing recent gains; the token’s prior rally was largely fueled by hopes of receiving free tokens. The plunge highlights memecoin volatility risks, showing how heavily prices can depend on.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/pump-falls-15-after-founder-confirms-no-immediate-airdrop/

data.title: Blackstone Reports Better-than-Expected Q2 2025 Results
data.description:
Blackstone's Q2 2025 results exceeded expectations with significant earnings growth. The company set a new record for assets under management and provided positive future guidance, highlighting strategic investments in various sectors.
source: https://tokenist.com/blackstone-reports-better-than-expected-q2-2025-results/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=blackstone-reports-better-than-expected-q2-2025-results

data.title: U.S. Court Reopens Trademark Lawsuit Involving Yuga Labs and NFT Series
data.description: According to Foresight News, a U.S. court has reopened the trademark lawsuit filed by Yuga Labs against concept artist Ryder Ripps and developer Jeremy Cahen. The court has ruled that a jury must determine whether their parody NFT series misled consumers. Greg Solano, co-founder of Yuga Labs, stated that the court recognized Yuga's Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) NFTs as protectable trademarks, dismissing claims that NFTs are too intangible to qualify for trademark protection under U.S. law. The court confirmed that NFTs can be protected as "goods" under the Lanham Act, rejecting arguments against their eligibility for trademark protection.

data.title: Building crypto vaults with Veda co-founder Sun Raghupathi
data.description:

data.title: A whale address that has been dormant for 14.5 years has revived. The address holds nearly 4,000 BTC, with an average holding price of $0.375
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, an ancient whale that hoarded 3,962.6 BTC 14 and a half years ago (January 2011) ended its hibernation 20 minutes ago and made a test transfer.
When this address hoarded these BTC in 2011, the price of BTC was only $0.375. Today, 14 and a half years later, the price of BTC is 315,000 times higher than it was then.
In addition, on-chain analyst Ai Yi said that the address also seems to belong to an early miner. Tracing back the TOP3 sources of funds, it was found that BTC all came from "Coinbase transactions", that is, mining income (not related to the exchange Coinbase).

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Aspecta (ASP) Token with Exclusive Airdrop for Eligible Users
data.description: Binance has announced an exciting new listing on Binance Alpha. The Aspecta (ASP) token is set to launch on July 24, 2025, at 18:00 (UTC+8), bringing a unique opportunity for Binance users to participate in an exclusive airdrop event.Aspecta (ASP) Token Launch Details- Listing Date: July 24, 2025- Listing Time: 18:00 (UTC+8)- Platform: Binance Alpha- Airdrop Amount: 125 ASP tokens per eligible userHow to Claim Your Aspecta (ASP) AirdropEligible Binance users can claim their ASP tokens using Binance Alpha Points. Here's what you need to know:1. Claim Period: Within 24 hours after trading begins2. Claiming Platform: Binance Alpha event page3. Cost: 15 Binance Alpha Points per applicationAirdrop Distribution PhasesThe ASP airdrop will be distributed in two phases:Phase 1 (First 18 Hours)- Eligibility: Users with at least 225 Alpha points- Duration: 18 hours from the start of tradingPhase 2 (Last 6 Hours)- Initial Eligibility: Users with at least 200 Alpha points- Distribution Method: First come, first served- Dynamic Threshold: Score requirement decreases by 10 points every hour if the event is not overImportant Notes for Participants- Users must confirm their airdrop application on the Alpha event page within 24 hours- Failure to confirm will result in forfeiting the airdrop opportunity- Each application consumes 15 Binance Alpha Points

data.title: Cardano Hits Major Breakthrough In Bitcoin DeFi With Smart Contract Innovation
data.description:
The Cardano development team at Input Output Global has built a new tool that allows smart contracts written for the blockchain to run on Bitcoin. The system, unveiled earlier this month, operates without modifying Bitcoin’s base code and could unlock new possibilities for DeFi on the network.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/24/cardano-hits-major-breakthrough-in-bitcoin-defi-with-smart-contract-innovation/

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Address Activated After 14.5 Years
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that a dormant Bitcoin address containing 3,962 bitcoins, valued at approximately $468 million, has been activated after 14.5 years of inactivity.

data.title: A whale liquidated the last 100 bitcoins and made a total profit of about $12 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the giant whale "1EGQSh" address deposited its remaining 100 BTC (approximately 11.88 million US dollars) into Binance an hour ago, making a total profit of approximately 12 million US dollars (+65%).

data.title: Chain Detective ZachXBT: Some projects run Yaps activities to attract low-quality users and AI-generated content, which will only dilute brand value
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain Detective ZachXBT posted on his personal channel that some projects currently attract low-quality users and AI-generated content by running Yaps activities, which dilutes the brand value and fails to bring long-term funds and real user growth. He called on the community to actively block related projects and question false data indicators to curb the phenomenon of "flooding of low-quality content" in the ecosystem.

data.title: A dormant BTC address for 14.5 years was activated, holding nearly 4,000 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, a dormant address containing 3,962 bitcoins (about 468 million US dollars) has just been activated after 14.5 years of silence.

data.title: 21Shares Partners with Société Générale to Boost ETP Liquidity in Europe
data.description:
According to PANews, 21Shares AG has announced a partnership with Société Générale to enhance the liquidity of its Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) on fund platforms in Germany and Eastern Europe. This agreement will see Société Générale providing over-the-counter liquidity for 21Shares' Bitcoin and Ethereum ETPs, specifically ABTC, CBTC, AETH, and CETH, on major fund platforms in these regions. The collaboration aims to make 21Shares' flagship cryptocurrency products more accessible to a broader range of professional investors, thereby expanding its institutional reach in Germany and Eastern Europe. This strategic move is expected to significantly improve the trading experience for investors in these markets
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27357191233417?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Hong Kong to criminalize unlicensed stablecoin promotions from Aug. 1
data.description:
Starting Aug. 1, offering or advertising unlicensed stablecoins to retail investors in Hong Kong could land violators with a $50,000 Hong Kong dollars fine and six months in jail.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hong-kong-stablecoin-law-august-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Murakami's NFT Series '108 Flowers Revised' Launches During Onchain Summer
data.description: According to BlockBeats, renowned contemporary artist Takashi Murakami announced on social media that his NFT series, '108 Flowers Revised,' inspired by his physical art collection, will be officially launched during the Onchain Summer event. The series is now available on the blockchain, and users can mint it directly through the Base app.Minting will commence at 9 a.m. on August 1, Japan time (5 p.m. on July 31, Pacific Time).

data.title: Solana developers consider increasing block limit by 66% to 100 million computational units to further increase network capacity
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Solana developers are considering raising the block limit from 60 million computing units to 100 million computing units through the SIMD-0286 proposal, which will achieve a 66% capacity increase, provided that validators choose to join the upgrade. The proposal aims to further increase the capacity of the Solana network, allowing more transactions per second to be processed. The computing unit is the basic unit for measuring transaction complexity and resource consumption in the Solana network. Increasing the block computing unit limit will directly enhance the network's transaction processing capabilities. (The Block)
